name: SOA and Web Services Testing: How Different Can It Be?
description: 26-page Aberdeen Group benchmark report examining testing and quality assurance challenges for SOA and web services deployments. Unit and functional testing insufficient; integration, regression, business process, performance, and security testing all required. Survey of 240 end-users categorizes companies into Best-in-Class (top 20%), Industry Average (middle 50%), and Laggard (bottom 30%) using Aberdeen Competitive Framework and PACE model. Best-in-Class companies redesigned QA processes, use automated testing, involve business users throughout lifecycle, and track quality across entire project—not just at end.
